message:
feat(tests): add 26 property tests for extension_events and session_metrics

14 proptests for extension_events (event name validation, apply_input_event_response
with None/null/string/block/continue/transform/numeric responses, block reason
extraction, ToolCallEventResult/InputEventResult deserialization)

12 proptests for session_metrics (TimingCounter sum/count/max tracking, average
floor division, reset, ByteCounter sum/count/avg/reset, TimingSnapshot and
ByteSnapshot display formatting)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
